title: Maripaha Ceviche Salad
description: A refreshing and healthy vegetarian ceviche salad made with maripaha, onions, and cilantro. A twist on the classic ceviche dish with no raw fish.
instructions: Cut the maripaha into small pieces and place in a large bowl.
In a separate bowl, mix together the lime juice and salt.
Add the lime juice mixture to the maripaha and toss to coat.
Thinly slice the red onion and add to the maripaha mixture.
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve chilled and garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
